(a) The department may award a contract for the installation, maintenance, or operation of a call box system in the manner provided by Chapter 223 (Bids and Contracts for Highway Projects) .

(b) The department may solicit proposals for and enter into one or more lease-purchase agreements under this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 226. Emergency Highway Call Box System
##### § 226.006 — Contracts for Implementation and Installation

(a) The department may award a contract for the installation, maintenance, or operation of a call box system in the manner provided by Chapter 223 (Bids and Contracts for Highway Projects) .

(b) The department may solicit proposals for and enter into one or more lease-purchase agreements under this chapter.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1171, Sec. 1.42, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department may award a contract for the installation, maintenance, or operation of a call box system in the manner provided by Chapter 223 (Bids and Contracts for Highway Projects) .

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department may solicit proposals for and enter into one or more lease-purchase agreements under this chapter.
